author: jamescvermont-cyber
description: Fruit guessing game — the bot shows a photo of a mystery fruit and players have 60 seconds to guess it. Type $fhint for up to 2 extra images, then a scrambled name.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not store any end user data.
install_msg: Load the cog with `[p]load fruitguesser`, then start a game with `$fruitguesser`.
name: FruitGuesser
